sys_script_client.description: Works with 2 UI Actions that Enable and Disable Shared Attachments for STRY0063547 Works with 2 UI Actions that Enable and Disable Shared Documents for STRY0063747
sys_script_client.messages: var answer=confirm("Are you sure you want to disable shared attachments? Shared attachments will not be deleted. You can re-enable sharing by selecting the 'Enable Shared Attachments' Menu Item");
sys_script_client.name: TemplateTask OnSubmit Shared Warning
